  • src.routers.plans

Source code for src.routers.plans

"""Public subscription plan catalog (no auth required)."""

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session

from src.database import get_db
from src.crud import subscription_plan as plan_crud
from src.schemas.subscription_plan import SubscriptionCatalogPublic

router = APIRouter(prefix="/plans", tags=["Plans"])




[docs]
@router.get("", response_model=SubscriptionCatalogPublic)
def get_subscription_catalog(db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
    """Active plans, trial length, and included features for landing, register, and billing UI."""
    return SubscriptionCatalogPublic(**plan_crud.build_public_catalog(db))
